CVE-2013-0162.title: The diff_pp function in lib/gauntlet_rubyparser.rb in the ruby_pa ...
CVE-2013-0162.summary: The diff_pp function in lib/gauntlet_rubyparser.rb in the ruby_parser gem 3.1.1 and earlier for Ruby allows local users to overwrite arbitrary files via a symlink attack on a temporary file with a predictable name in /tmp.
